announcement.title: Selamat Datang Di Launcher Roby Gaming
announcement.message:
Yuk Cek Sama-Sama Apa Yang Baru..? 

1.Top Up Di Roby Gaming Gunakan Promonya Cukup Klik Gambarnya Saja. 
2.Update Mod/Cheat, 
- Perbaru Mod Unlock DLC The Sims 4
- Graveyard Keeper - Bahasa Indonesia v1.0.0
- House Of Legacy - Bahasa Indonesia v2.5.0

3.Add Game, 
- Graveyard Keeper v1.407
- House Of Legacy v0.9.0
